mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical WHERE chemical_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical ( chemical_id, chemical_name_ko, chemical_name_en, cas_number, hazard_class, status, msds_file_id, storage_location, storage_quantity, unit, max_storage_limit, supplier, department, handler_name, emergency_procedure, last_inspection_date, next_inspection_date, ghs_pictogram, signal_word, hazard_statements, precautionary_statements, molecular_formula, applicable_regulation, ghs_classification, exposure_limit, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{chemicalId}, #{chemicalNameKo}, #{chemicalNameEn}, #{casNumber}, #{hazardClass}, #{status}, #{msdsFileId}, #{storageLocation}, #{storageQuantity}, #{unit}, #{maxStorageLimit}, #{supplier}, #{department}, #{handlerName}, #{emergencyProcedure}, #{lastInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{ghsPictogram}, #{signalWord}, #{hazardStatements}, #{precautionaryStatements}, #{molecularFormula}, #{applicableRegulation}, #{ghsClassification}, #{exposureLimit}, #{notes}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical SET chemical_name_ko = #{chemicalNameKo}, chemical_name_en = #{chemicalNameEn}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, hazard_class = #{hazardClass}, status = #{status}, msds_file_id = #{msdsFileId}, storage_location = #{storageLocation}, storage_quantity = #{storageQuantity}, unit = #{unit}, max_storage_limit = #{maxStorageLimit}, supplier = #{supplier}, department = #{department}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, emergency_procedure = #{emergencyProcedure}, last_inspection_date = #{lastInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_inspection_date = #{nextInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, ghs_pictogram = #{ghsPictogram}, signal_word = #{signalWord}, hazard_statements = #{hazardStatements}, precautionary_statements = #{precautionaryStatements}, molecular_formula = #{molecularFormula}, applicable_regulation = #{applicableRegulation}, ghs_classification = #{ghsClassification}, exposure_limit = #{exposureLimit}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
